task: Find technical specs for the latest Macbook Air on Apple.
final_result_response:
I now have all the technical specifications. Let me compile them into a clean summary.

Here are the **Technical Specifications for the Latest MacBook Air (M5, 2025)** from Apple's website (https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/):

---

## MacBook Air – Technical Specifications

Available in **13-inch** and **15-inch** models.

---

### 🖥️ 13-inch MacBook Air

| Spec | Details |
|---|---|
| **Starting Price** | $1,099 / $1,299 / $1,499 |
| **Chip** | Apple M5 – 10-core CPU (4 super + 6 efficiency cores), 8-core or 10-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine, 153GB/s memory bandwidth |
| **Memory** | 16GB, 24GB, or 32GB unified memory |
| **Storage** | 512GB, 1TB, 2TB, or 4TB SSD |
| **Display** | 13.6-inch Liquid Retina, 2560×1664 at 224ppi, 500 nits, True Tone, P3 wide color |
| **Battery** | Up to 18 hrs video streaming / 15 hrs wireless web; 53.8Wh battery |
| **Charging** | MagSafe 3 + two Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C) ports; 40W adapter (60W max), fast-charge with 70W+ |
| **Size & Weight** | 0.44 × 11.97 × 8.46 in; **2.7 lbs (1.23 kg)** |

---

### 🖥️ 15-inch MacBook Air

| Spec | Details |
|---|---|
| **Starting Price** | $1,299 / $1,499 / $1,699 |
| **Chip** | Apple M5 – 10-core CPU, 10-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine, 153GB/s memory bandwidth |
| **Memory** | 16GB, 24GB, or 32GB unified memory |

---

### 🔌 Connectivity (Both Models)
- **Ports:** MagSafe 3, 2× Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C, up to 40Gb/s), 3.5mm headphone jack
- **External Displays:** Up to 2 external displays (up to 8K@60Hz or 4K@240Hz)
- **Wi-Fi:** Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) via Apple N1 wireless chip
- **Bluetooth:** Bluetooth 6
- **Thread** networking technology

---

### 📷 Camera & Audio
- **Camera:** 12MP Center Stage camera, 1080p HD video, Desk View support
- **Audio:** Four-speaker system with Spatial Audio & Dolby Atmos, 3-mic array with directional beamforming, Voice Isolation & Wide Spectrum modes

---

### ⌨️ Keyboard & Trackpad
- Backlit Magic Keyboard with Touch ID, 78 (ANSI) / 79 (ISO) keys, 12 function keys
- Force Touch trackpad with Multi-Touch gestures

---

### 💻 Software
- **OS:** macOS (latest, with Apple Intelligence)
- **Media Engine:** Hardware-accelerated H.264, HEVC, ProRes, ProRes RAW, AV1 decode

---

### 🌿 Materials
- 55% recycled content; 100% recycled aluminum enclosure; ENERGY STAR® certified; 100% fiber-based packaging

---

### 🎨 Colors
Sky Blue, Silver, Starlight, Midnight

---

Source: [apple.com/macbook-air/specs](https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/)

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to find the technical specifications for the latest MacBook Air on Apple's website (apple.com).

**Output Assessment:** The agent produced a comprehensive, well-formatted summary of the MacBook Air M5 (2025) technical specifications, including chip details (Apple M5, 10-core CPU), memory options (16/24/32GB), storage (512GB–4TB), display, battery, connectivity (Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, Thunderbolt 4), camera, audio, keyboard, colors, and environmental info for both 13-inch and 15-inch models. The source URL (apple.com/macbook-air/specs/) was cited.

**Evidence:** Step files provide strong evidence of task completion. Step 1 shows navigation to `https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/`. Steps 3–5 show Python code extracting page text, and the raw output directly contains Apple's spec data: "MacBook Air Technical Specifications", Apple M5 chip with "10-core CPU with 4 super cores and 6 efficiency cores", memory options, storage options, display specs ("2560-by-1664 native resolution at 224 pixels per inch"), battery ("Up to 18 hours video streaming"), Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), Bluetooth 6, 12MP camera, weight (2.7 pounds), etc. All these match what was reported in the final answer. Execution integrity is healthy with no errors.

**Summary:** The agent navigated directly to Apple's MacBook Air specs page and extracted comprehensive technical specifications using Python/BeautifulSoup. The step files confirm the raw extracted data matches the final response, providing clear positive evidence of successful task completion.
